title: IronCasting
description: Cast ISS spells in Hexcasting form.
body:
# Ironcastinng  

Cast [ISS](https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks) spells in [Hexcasting](https://modrinth.com/mod/hex-casting) forms.  

## Features

1. Read associated patterns out from ISS's scrolls.  
2. Cast those patterns in Hex forms, using media instead of mana. Some support more precise control.  

## Notice  

Only limited tests are conducted, there may be numerous bugs. :(
